# Samuel & Audrey Photography Metadata Archive

This dataset contains 98,965 travel photography metadata records connected to the Samuel & Audrey Media Network image archive.

Canonical dataset:
https://huggingface.co/datasets/samuelandaudreymedianetwork/samuel-and-audrey-photography-metadata-archive

Zenodo DOI:
https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18665236

Recommended files:
- samuel-and-audrey-photography-metadata.jsonl
- samuel-and-audrey-photography-metadata.csv
- DATA_DICTIONARY.md
- SCHEMA.json
- CITATION.cff

Records:
- 98,965 photo_metadata records

Note:
This dataset contains metadata and source URLs, not embedded image files.

License:
CC BY-NC 4.0

Contact:
nomadicsamuel@gmail.com
